---
title: "Assignments and Labs"
---

*Quarter:* {{< var quarter >}}

<!-- Internal: placeholder. Per-assignment pages will live in `assignments/`;
     this index page will eventually be rendered from `data/assignments.yml`. -->


## Homework

- _HW1 — TBD_
- _HW2 — TBD_

## Labs

- _Lab 1 — USV System Identification (Week 3)_
- _Lab 2 — USV PID Tuning (Week 7)_
- _Lab 3 — USV Navigation Tuning (Week 10)_

## Exams

- _Final Oral Exams (Week 11)_
